subcodes.first_line: O thou who art struck unconscious and thunderstruck by the revelation of the All-Merciful! It is dawn, and a company of friends, like unto candles, are in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من خر مغشیا صعقا من تجلی الرحمن صبح است و جمعی از دوستان چون شمع در این
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
